rationale: The cited paper appears to be a substantive prior on marketing-effect persistence: it estimates permanent vs transitory promotion effects using ADF tests, VAR, and impulse responses, which directly overlaps with the citing paper’s stated critique/comparison of conventional unit-root/VAR-style persistence modeling. Given this methodological and construct-level alignment (long-term vs short-term marketing effects), this is not an obvious incidental mention and should be reviewed in full.
